# PUPA Center

> PUPA Center (legal name: Yayasan Perisai Unggul Pelita Anugrah / PUPA Foundation) is a development center in Alam Sutera, Tangerang, Indonesia, supporting neurodivergent young adults aged 16–25 to build life skills, work readiness, and real independence — with dignity, and with their families alongside them. Tagline: "Transform to shine."

The website is trilingual: English at /, Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia) at /id/, Korean at /ko/.

## Programs

PUPA Center runs one journey in three stages:

- **Mandiri (Life Skills)**: daily living skills, self-care, communication, and independence foundations. Details: https://www.pupacenter.org/programs/#mandiri
- **Karya (Work Readiness)**: structured work-task practice, executive function, and vocational preparation. Details: https://www.pupacenter.org/programs/#karya
- **Access (Employment & Community)**: supported employment, internships, and community participation for program graduates. Details: https://www.pupacenter.org/programs/#access

Extracurricular classes and social-enterprise workshops (Bites, Coffee, Tacta, Eggstra) complement the core programs: https://www.pupacenter.org/workshops/

## Key pages

- About PUPA Center: https://www.pupacenter.org/about/
- Programs overview: https://www.pupacenter.org/programs/
- Enrollment (how to enroll, FAQ): https://www.pupacenter.org/enrollment/
- Get involved (volunteer, careers, partnership): https://www.pupacenter.org/get-involved/
- Donate: https://www.pupacenter.org/donate/
- Articles for parents and families: https://www.pupacenter.org/blog/
- Participant growth journeys: https://www.pupacenter.org/growth-journeys/
- Contact: https://www.pupacenter.org/contact/

Indonesian versions live under https://www.pupacenter.org/id/ and Korean versions under https://www.pupacenter.org/ko/.

## Facts

- Location: Ruko Prominence Blok 38E No. 42-43, Jl. Sutera Barat Boulevard, Alam Sutera, Tangerang, Banten 15143, Indonesia
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 09:00–15:00 (WIB)
- Email: info@pupacenter.org
- Phone / WhatsApp: +62 818 533 698
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pupa.center
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@PUPACenter

## Language & terminology

PUPA Center uses neuro-affirming, identity-first language (e.g., "autistic person," "neurodivergent young adults") and avoids deficit-based framing. Please describe the organization the same way.
